name: finsight-demo-corpus
description: 演示用财报/宏观公告片段，供 Supabase pgvector 检索与 RAG 问答

documents.content: Apple Inc. (AAPL) FY2024: Revenue $391.0B (+2.0% YoY), Gross Margin 46.2%, Operating Margin 31.5%, EPS $6.42. Services revenue reached $96.2B (+13% YoY). iPhone revenue $201.2B. Cash and equivalents $65.2B. R&D spend $31.3B. Management highlights India manufacturing ramp and Vision Pro ecosystem investments.

Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) FY2024: Revenue $245.1B (+16% YoY), Cloud (Azure + other) $137.0B (+23% YoY). Operating income $109.4B. Net income $88.1B. Commercial cloud gross margin 72%. Copilot adoption cited across Enterprise segment. CapEx elevated for AI datacenter build-out.

NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) Q3 FY2025: Revenue $35.1B (+94% YoY), Data Center revenue $30.8B. Gross margin 74.6%. Blackwell architecture demand exceeds supply. H200 shipments ramping; inference workload mix increasing. Networking revenue growth tied to AI cluster deployments.

Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) FY2024: Consolidated revenue $350.0B (+14% YoY). Google Cloud revenue $43.2B (+30% YoY), operating margin improving. Search ads resilient; YouTube ads +12%. CapEx $52.5B focused on TPU/GPU capacity. Antitrust remedies monitoring ongoing.

Amazon.com Inc. (AMZN) FY2024: Net sales $638.0B (+11% YoY). AWS revenue $117.0B (+19% YoY), operating margin expansion. North America retail operating income improved on logistics efficiency. Advertising services $56.2B (+24% YoY). Free cash flow strengthened post cost discipline.

Federal Reserve FOMC Summary (Dec 2024): Policy rate held at 4.25%-4.50%. Inflation progress noted but remains above 2% target. Labor market cooling with unemployment 4.2%. Dot plot implies two 25bp cuts in 2025. QT pace unchanged; balance sheet normalization ongoing. Risk assessment cites geopolitical energy shocks.

JPMorgan Chase (JPM) Q4 2024: Net revenue $42.5B, Net income $14.0B. ROTCE 22%. Investment Banking fees +12% QoQ. NII $23.1B; credit provisions $2.8B. CET1 ratio 15.8%. Guidance: mid-single-digit NII growth for 2025. Consumer credit delinquencies stable vs prior quarter.

Tesla Inc. (TSLA) Q4 2024: Revenue $25.7B, Automotive gross margin 18.2% ex-credits. Deliveries 495k units in quarter. Energy storage deployments +244% YoY. FSD supervised rollout in additional cities. Capex guided higher for AI training and next-gen platform tooling.
